---
applyTo: "style.css"
---

# Theme Metadata Instructions

`style.css` must describe `ati-theme-2026` as a standalone ATI Holidays block theme.

Do not include:

- a parent-template header
- the legacy child-theme text domain
- child-theme descriptions
- inherited Ollie marketing copy

Keep CSS limited to behavior-constrained rules that cannot reasonably live in `theme.json` or style variation JSON.
